task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler editor or view showing the title exactly as '$:/custom/ui/ViewTemplate/Backlinks'.
The tag '$:/tags/ViewTemplate' is visible in the tags field of the newly created tiddler.

task_completion.description: Add dynamic logic to the tiddler body to display a 'Backlinks' heading and list referring tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
The tiddler body contains wikitext with a heading (e.g., '! Backlinks' or '

Backlinks

') and a list widget or filter using 'backlinks[]' to dynamically generate links.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tiddler with incoming links displays the 'Backlinks' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler with incoming links (e.g., 'Evergreen Notes') is open in view mode and shows a 'Backlinks' heading at the bottom with one or more clickable links to referring tiddlers.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tiddler with no incoming links completely hides the 'Backlinks' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler with no incoming links (e.g., 'Orphan Note') is open in view mode and does NOT show a 'Backlinks' heading or any backlinks list at the bottom.

integrity.description: Agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create and edit the tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser, not terminal commands or external text editors.

integrity.description: The Backlinks list is generated dynamically, not hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler body uses TiddlyWiki filter syntax (like `[all[current]backlinks[]]`) rather than static markdown/wikitext links.

integrity.description: The verification of linked and orphan tiddlers happens in the normal TiddlyWiki view mode.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test tiddlers ('Evergreen Notes' and 'Orphan Note') are viewed in the standard TiddlyWiki story river in view mode, not in edit mode.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected ViewTemplate tag is '$:/tags/ViewTemplate' and the expected filter operator is 'backlinks[]'. The setup provides 'Evergreen Notes' as the test case for a tiddler with incoming links, and 'Orphan Note' as the test case for a tiddler with no incoming links.
